forbidden_files_raw: `app/demo/**/*`, `app/api/**/*`, `lib/briefing/**/*`, `lib/cron/**/*`, `supabase/**/*`, and unrelated product/runtime files outside this homepage seam
required_local_proof: `npm run health`, `npm run lint`, `npm run build`, `npx playwright test tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts --grep "Landing page /"`, `npx playwright test tests/e2e/mobile-visual-qa.spec.ts --grep "scrollWidth ≤ viewport: home|opens full-screen overlay, closes on X"`
required_browser_proof: Open the local production build in the in-app browser at desktop and mobile widths, confirm the homepage first viewport communicates the full Foldera story, and confirm `/demo` still loads.
browser_proof_command: Local production build on `http://127.0.0.1:3000/`: inspect desktop and mobile homepage, confirm `See live demo` routes to `/demo`, then open `http://127.0.0.1:3000/demo` and verify the Executive Briefing title still loads.
anti_regression_checks: Homepage first viewport states connected sources, ranked move, draft, source trail, and approval
Primary CTA points to `/demo` and secondary CTA points to `/start`
Public nav exposes Product / Security / Pricing / Sign in / See demo without dead links
Mobile homepage has no horizontal overflow and hamburger menu still closes cleanly
`/demo` still loads unchanged on the same local production build
next_command: Homepage front-door seam is in scope for commit: keep the change inside the landing page, public nav, homepage metadata, homepage route proof, and session history; verify health, lint, build, focused landing/mobile Playwright, in-app browser proof, then commit and push.
